name: Extreme Overtake
detailed_description:
ExtremeOvertake,racing car.The game includes multiple perspectives, allowing players to travel around the world from a top-down perspective and appreciate the rich, colorful, and distinctive scenery.If the player drives the vehicle off the track, they can quickly reset it back to the track.
Two modes can choose
Racing mode
You can choose the map and stage, change the number of computer players, and compete
Season mode
In one season, four stages of competition, try to overtake from the 101st place to the first place
Winning the game can get bonuses, and the bonuses can unlock vehicles, and the color of the vehicle can be customized at will.
Five map can challenge.
